SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
Application
An application that accesses sample dataset through a hypermedia-based RESTful Web Service.
Constants
The constants.
Department
Simple JavaBean domain object representing a department.
DepartmentAssembler
The RepresentationModelAssembler for the Department.
The instance of the Department is wrapped into the EntityModel instance.
The collection of the Departments is wrapped into the CollectionModel instance.
DepartmentController
The HATEOAS RESTful web service controller for the Department.
Employee
Simple JavaBean domain object representing an employee.
EmployeeAssembler
The RepresentationModelAssembler for the Employee.
The instance of the Employee is wrapped into the EntityModel instance.
The collection of the Employees is wrapped into the CollectionModel instance.
EmployeeController
The HATEOAS RESTful web service controller for the Employee.
SampleDataset
The sample dataset.
SampleDatasetLoaderController
The sample dataset loader controller.
